definition: Break off (a meeting, legal case, or game) with the intention of resuming it later.
The use of an arbitrator to settle a dispute.
Negotiate the terms and conditions of a transaction.

meaning: Abbreviation for 'Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement'; your backup plan if negotiations fail.
definition: Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement; the most advantageous alternative course of action a party can take if negotiations fail and an agreement cannot be reached.
example: Knowing our BATNA helped us remain calm when the client threatened to leave the meeting.

definition: A group discussion to produce ideas or solve problems.
An alternative proposal made in response to a previous proposal that is regarded as unacceptable or unsatisfactory.
A person or thing that makes an action or process easy or easier.
A person who takes part in a dialogue or conversation.

meaning: The power or advantage to influence people and get the results you want in a negotiation.
definition: The power to influence a person or situation to achieve a particular outcome.
example: Having a second job offer gave the candidate great leverage when negotiating their salary.

meaning: A written record of what was discussed and decided in a meeting
definition: The written record of a meeting.
example: The secretary shared the meeting minutes with all participants.

meaning: An open area of land designated for parking cars and other vehicles.
definition: A place during a meeting to note down important topics that are not relevant to the current discussion so they can be addressed later.
example: The shopping center has a large parking lot that is free for customers.

definition: An analysis or discussion of an event held soon after it has occurred, especially in order to determine why it was a failure.
The minimum number of members of an assembly or society that must be present at any of its meetings to make the proceedings of that meeting valid.
Convene or cause to convene again, especially after a pause in proceedings.
A condition or requirement that is specified or demanded as part of an agreement.
A non-binding agreement setting forth the basic terms and conditions under which an investment will be made.
A final demand or statement of terms, the rejection of which will result in retaliation or a breakdown in relations.
